entity.summary: Perpetual decentralized exchange offering around-the-clock leveraged trading across crypto, equities, commodities, exchange-traded funds, and foreign-exchange markets with USDC margin.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes a live 24/7 perpetual trading platform with market-specific leverage, instant settlement, trading APIs, and hundreds of crypto and traditional-asset markets. Current independently maintained metrics report non-zero perpetual volume, fees, TVL, and open interest. The entity consolidates Vest Markets and Vest Exchange naming under one record. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: About Vest Markets
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Vest Markets as a current 24/7 perpetual trading platform for equities, crypto, commodities, exchange-traded funds, and foreign exchange, with leverage and instant settlement.

evidence.title: Vest Markets protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with fees, TVL, and open interest, supporting active classification.
